title: Recursive Coding Agents - Raymond Weitekamp, OpenProse
summary: Raymond Weitekamp discusses Recursive Language Models and how their inference-time compute patterns can be applied to coding agents to achieve higher performance and reliability. The approach explores structured recursion as a mechanism for enhancing agent capabilities.
